response.original_title: How do I get my money back out from Uphold?
response.overview: Account holders can call on ☎️ +1-(858)-423-8635 to request and initiate a refund at Uphold Wallet (US). Uphold Wallet (US) dispute center at ☎️ +1-(858)-423-8635 offers a straightforward process for refunds, but it's essential to understand the specific circumstances under which a refund is eligible. If a transaction error occurs contact ☎️ +1-(858)-423-8635, Uphold Wallet (US) may refund the transaction if it is due to a technical issue on their end, such as a network or system outage. Immediately Call on ☎️ +1-(858)-423-8635 to raise an Uphold Wallet (US) Transaction dispute & request a refund. Uphold Wallet (US) dispute help center at  ☎️ +1-(858)-423-8635 can issue refunds directly to the customer's wallet, but this requires the customer to provide valid wallet details.
response.title: How do I get my money back out from Uphold?
